college_info.college_name: GTC - Global Technical Campus: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Placements, Reviews

highlights.summary: Here are some additional updates regarding the GTC - Global Technical Campus:

placements.overview: Established in 2002, GTC - Global Technical Campus is a private institute in Jaipur, Rajasthan. The institute is approved by the AICTE and PCI. At the UG, PG and Doctorate levels, the institute offers 19 courses across 6 specialisations in Full Time mode. The popular GTC - Global Technical Campus programs include B.E. / B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech, B.Pharma, Ph.D. and D.Pharma. GTC - Global Technical Campus courses are provided in several streams including Engineering and Medicine & Health Sciences, etc. The institute has a total seat intake of 132 students. The fees at GTC - Global Technical Campus ranges between INR 1,54,000 to 3,84,172 for the different courses. The institute has a well-laid infrastructure with multiple facilities.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Data Science) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Placement is very excellent, technology is very good, and college is very good.

review_content.Placements: In my college, the percentage is very necessary. The highest is 76 per cent. The highest package is 40 LPA, and the average is 25 LPA, while the lowest is 15 LPA. Google, Jawa, Apple, Amazon, and other top companies also come for internships. Teachers are very excellent and well-qualified for teaching.
review_content.Infrastructure: College is very good. Well-qualified teachers are also good at teaching. All facilities are available for studying. Classes are always clean. The hostel is excellent, and the mess is also very clean for eating food. Sports are planned according to the timetable. Facilities are available all the time without asking.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Improving campus, great student life, but faculty expertise changes a lot!

review_content.Placements: In my college, almost 90% of students get placed every year, so it's kind of average. The highest package was 90 LPA, the lowest is 3.5 LPA, and the average package is 4 LPA, to be honest. There are startup companies that show interest in our college. 80% students get an internship easily, while the rest need to do hard work.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available on the whole campus, there are all kinds of labs, including the modern ones, classrooms are spacious and clean, there's a library too with a lot of books available, and the whole campus is covered with a centralised ducting system. The quality of food is above average in the mess and canteen, there's no medical facility available from the side of the college, except for an ambulance that takes you to the nearby hospital. RUHS offers all kinds of sports and games.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Cyber Security) - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Good placement in 2025, really good in technical learning.

review_content.Placements: A minimum of 70 percent of students are placed on campus. The highest package of our college is Rs. 10,00,000, the lowest package is 3.4 LPA, and the average package is 6.5 LPA. Many companies come to college to give an opportunity as an intern in those companies. Cybersecurity is best.
review_content.Infrastructure: Good infrastructure of our college. Good Wi-Fi speed, well-recognised labs and classes. The food in the mess is best and well served, and the canteen is open until 10.00 pm. Every Saturday, we play games like cricket, basketball, volleyball and kabaddi.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Cyber Security) - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: College is good if you are a curious student, then you can get placed easily.

review_content.Placements: 75 percent of students got placed this year. The highest package offered is around 12 to 13LPA and the average package offered is around 4 to 5 LPA. Almost every student got internships, and 75 to 80 percent of students got placed. The companies that come here are mostly from Jaipur or the nearby area, such as Gurgaon.
review_content.Infrastructure: Food is edible most of the time in the hostel. Library has almost all kinds of course related books, and other books are also available here. The full campus is secured with CCTV, and Wi-Fi is available at almost every place in the college. It has one of the best infrastructures in Jaipur.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Internet of Things) - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Good college if you like a peaceful area and a city that has a rich heritage.

review_content.Placements: 70 percent of students are placed. 12 to 15LPA is the highest package offered and 4 to 5LPA is the lowest package offered. Hackingly Goldman Sachs offers 75 percent. Software Engineers and Java Developers are roles offered as the company requires. I mean students can get placed if their aptitude is good they can crack the job interview easily with answerable theory and coding knowledge.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is the best. Hostel food quality is okay I mean it is edible. Medical facilities are good I mean college has its own ambulance and hospital is also nearby. All sports are available such as cricket football basketball volleyball badminton and table tennis.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: College is quite good for academic facilities and overall good exposure for studies.

review_content.Placements: In Global Institute of Technology, Jaipur, most of the companies visiting are startups, very few MNCs visit here, like Mera Cube. But the alumni network of GIT is excellent, and even some of the alumni are doing very well and working at Google, etc. The average package offered was 4 LPA last year, and almost 85 percent of students got placed.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure here is quite good, especially since the hostel rooms are very good, well-structured, and furnished with AC and Wi-Fi available 24 hours. As well as the facilities, the classrooms and labs are very good too. With all the excellent academic facilities, the quality of food is also good and well cleaned, and there is a canteen, an ambulance for 24 hours for emergency services, and quite good sports facilities too. The academy infrastructure is very good.
